quota_upgrade_required: You've reached the {resource} limit ({used}/{limit}). Upgrade to the {plan} plan to continue.
select_business_required: Please select a business to continue.
business_setup_incomplete: This business hasn't finished setup yet. Ask the owner to complete it, or choose another business.
invite_contact_required: Provide a phone or email for the invite.
invite_already_member: This user is already a member of the business.
invite_already_pending: An invite is already pending for this user.
team_cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove yourself from the business.
team_cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role.
invalid_sku_format: SKU must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
product_not_publishable: This product is not ready to be published to your store.
product_sku_generation_failed: Unable to generate a unique SKU.
product_sku_immutable: SKU cannot be changed once the product is created.
product_images_limit_reached: A product can only have up to 10 images.
category_has_products: This category still has products assigned to it.
category_parent_has_products: Cannot nest under a category that already has products assigned. Move the products to a sub-category first.
category_parent_has_variant_options: Cannot nest under a category that has variant options. Remove its variant options first.
category_parent_cycle: A category cannot be moved under itself or one of its descendants.
category_reparent_has_children: Move or remove this category's sub-categories before changing its parent.
category_not_leaf: Products can only be assigned to a leaf category (one with no sub-categories).
image_not_found: The referenced image could not be found. Upload the image again before saving.
attribute_group_name_exists: An attribute group with this name already exists.
attribute_group_in_use: This attribute group is linked to one or more categories and cannot be deleted.
attribute_option_exists: This option already exists in the group.
attribute_group_already_linked: This attribute group is already linked to the category.
category_attribute_group_not_found: This attribute group is not linked to the category.
variants_not_supported: Variants are not supported for this product type.
variant_min_two: A product with variants must have at least 2 variants.
variant_not_found: The selected variant is not available.
variant_options_required: Select at least one option for the variant.
variant_duplicate_combination: A variant with this combination already exists.
quantity_must_be_integer: "{name}" can only be sold in whole units.
bundle_components_required: A composite product must have at least one component.
bundle_component_nested: A composite product cannot contain another composite product.
not_composite: This product is not a composite product.
serialized_only_simple: Serial tracking is only available for simple products.
serial_type_required: Select a serial type for serialised products.
serial_unit_unavailable: The selected unit is no longer available.
serial_unit_variant_mismatch: The selected unit does not belong to the chosen variant.
product_not_serialized: This product does not track serial numbers.
serial_variant_required: Select a variant for each serial unit.
serial_variant_invalid: The selected variant does not belong to this product.
serial_unit_not_in_stock: Only in-stock units can be retired.
online_store_exists: This business already has an online store.
online_min_order_not_met: The order does not meet the minimum amount.
inventory_insufficient_stock: Not enough stock available for this adjustment.
unit_of_measure_exists: A unit of measure with this name already exists.
unit_of_measure_in_use: Unit of measure is in use.
unit_of_measure_system_immutable: System units of measure cannot be modified or deleted.
expense_category_in_use: This category still has {count} expenses assigned to it.
expense_category_system_immutable: System expense categories cannot be modified or deleted.
contact_phone_invalid: Enter a valid primary phone number for this contact.
contact_already_exists: A contact with this primary phone number already exists for this type.
contact_inactive: This contact is inactive and cannot be used for new credit transactions.
contact_has_open_debts: This contact still has open debts and cannot be deactivated.
contact_statement_direction_required: This contact has both receivables and payables. Specify the statement direction.
customer_contact_required_for_credit: A customer contact is required whenever a sale leaves a balance on credit.
supplier_contact_required_for_credit: A supplier contact is required whenever a restock leaves a balance on credit.
debt_payment_locked: Payments cannot be recorded against a settled or written-off debt.
debt_offset_nothing: Nothing to offset — the contact needs an open balance on both sides.
debt_payment_amount_exceeds_outstanding: Payment amount exceeds the outstanding balance.
debt_payment_date_invalid: Payment date cannot be before the debt creation date.
debt_payment_forbidden: Only owners and managers can delete debt payments.
debt_write_off_forbidden: Only owners and managers can write off debts.
debt_already_written_off: This debt has already been written off.
debt_already_settled: This debt has already been settled.
underpayment: Amount paid ({paid}) is less than total ({total}).
product_inventory_tracking_required: This product does not track inventory and cannot be restocked.
restock_total_amount_required: Provide a total purchase amount when one or more restock items do not include a unit cost.
restock_total_amount_mismatch: The provided total purchase amount does not match the sum of the restock item costs.
restock_payment_exceeds_total: Recorded restock payments cannot exceed the total purchase amount.
sales_void_forbidden: Only owners and managers can void sales.
deposit_account_already_exists: A deposit account already exists for this customer.
deposit_account_number_in_use: This account number is already in use.
deposit_amount_invalid: Amount must be greater than zero.
deposit_void_requires_deposit_account: Cannot process void: deposit account not found.
invalid_date_range: The end date must be on or after the start date.
date_range_too_large: The selected date range cannot exceed 12 months.
server_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
